entities.name: NEPAL
entities.description: Country divided into four major agroclimatic zones where legumes are important components of farming systems and diets

entities.name: TERAI
entities.description: Agroclimatic zone in southern Nepal, part of the Indo-Gangetic Plain, where most legumes are grown

entities.name: INDO-GANGETIC PLAIN
entities.description: Geographic region to the south that includes the Terai

entities.name: INNER TERAI
entities.description: Agroclimatic zone in Nepal requiring baseline agronomic research on soil fertility management

entities.name: MID-HILLS AND VALLEYS
entities.description: Agroclimatic zone in Nepal

entities.name: HIGH MOUNTAINS
entities.description: Agroclimatic zone in northern Nepal characterized by course-textured gravel soil

entities.name: SOIL TEXTURE
entities.description: Physical property of soil that varies from rich alluvial deposits in the Terai to course-textured gravel in the high mountains

entities.name: ANNUAL RAINFALL
entities.description: Environmental factor in Nepal varying from 5500 mm to 3500 mm

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: Environmental factor in Nepal varying from -10°C to 35°C

entities.name: LEGUMES
entities.description: Important components of Nepalese farming systems and diets, often grown in the Terai

entities.name: CROPPING PATTERNS
entities.description: The arrangement and sequence of crops grown in the Terai

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: Productivity of legumes, which has remained low at usually less than 0.7 t ha-1

entities.name: BIOTIC AND ABIOTIC CONSTRAINTS
entities.description: Factors that contribute to the low yields of legumes

entities.name: BOTRYTIS CINEREA
entities.description: Damaging pest affecting chickpea and lentil

entities.name: POD BORERS
entities.description: Damaging pests affecting chickpea and lentil

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Legume crop damaged by Botrytis cinerea and pod borers

entities.name: LENTIL
entities.description: Legume crop damaged by Botrytis cinerea and pod borers

entities.name: FUSARIUM WILT
entities.description: Disease that largely affects the pigeonpea crop

entities.name: STERILITY MOSAIC
entities.description: Disease that largely affects the pigeonpea crop

entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Legume crop affected by fusarium wilt and sterility mosaic

entities.name: BASELINE AGRONOMIC RESEARCH
entities.description: Research required for soil fertility management in different agroclimatic zones

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Management practice for cropping systems with grain legumes as component crops
